context_values.current.preamble: Goal: Build Fabro Racer — a 3D voxel kart racer using Three.js with 4 tracks, 8 characters, items, drifting, and CPU opponents. Output is static HTML + JS files.
context_values.graph.goal: Build Fabro Racer — a 3D voxel kart racer using Three.js with 4 tracks, 8 characters, items, drifting, and CPU opponents. Output is static HTML + JS files.
context_values.response.expand_spec:
The spec is written to `.workflow/spec.md`. Here's a summary of what it covers:

**Complete game design spec for Fabro Racer** — 22 sections, ~1,200 lines:

| Section | Key Decisions |
|---------|--------------|
| **Driving Model** | Arcade physics, 28 u/s base speed, 3-tier drift-boost (0.7s/1.1s/1.5s), forgiving wall collisions (glancing=15% scrub, head-on=40%) |
| **4 Tracks** | Sunset Circuit (beginner oval, 32s lap), Fungal Canyon (figure-8 with bridge, 45s), Neon Grid (technical chicanes+jump, 52s), Frostbite Pass (mountain elevation loop, 58s) — each with hazards, shortcuts, AI splines, color palettes |
| **8 Characters** | Blip (handler), Grumble (tank), Zephyr (speedster), Cinder (accel), Tundra (heavy defender), Pixel (balanced), Mossworth (steady), Stardust (wildcard) — 14 total stat points each, unique AI personalities |
| **6 Items** | Spark Orb, Banana Peel, Turbo Mushroom, Homing Pigeon, Oil Slick, Speed Leech — position-weighted distribution, max 1.2s disruption, defensive items holdable as rear shields |
| **AI System** | Spline-following with PD controller, 3 difficulty presets (Chill/Standard/Mean), drift zone awareness, item logic, deliberate mistakes for organic feel |
| **Technical Architecture** | Pure static files, ES modules with import map for Three.js CDN, procedural textures via Canvas, Web Audio API for all sound, fixed-timestep physics at 60Hz, HTML/CSS HUD overlay |
| **Full UI Flow** | Title → Track Select → Character Select → Options → Countdown → Racing → Results, with pause menu, minimap, stat bars, item roulette |
| **9-Phase Build Plan** | Ordered from core driving loop → tracks → drift → AI → items → characters → UI → audio → polish |
